architecture_decisions.title: Client-side Favorites Persistence
architecture_decisions.description: Use localStorage for favorites to keep it lightweight and server-independent.
architecture_decisions.rationale: Favorites are user-specific UI preferences and don't require server-side state for this MVP.

architecture_decisions.title: CSS-only Sidebar Tooltips
architecture_decisions.description: Use data-tooltip attribute and ::after pseudo-element for sidebar tooltips.
architecture_decisions.rationale: Avoids JS overhead for simple hover state tooltips in the sidebar.

technical_constraints: Favor CSS over JS for UI state where possible.
Ensure favorites are updated immediately in the UI when toggled.
Maintain backward compatibility with the existing sidebar toggle logic.

required_checks: Verify CSS specificity doesn't break existing sidebar styles
acceptance_criteria: Collapse sidebar and verify tooltip visibility on hover.

tasks.goal: Implement CSS-driven tooltips for sidebar links, visible when the sidebar is collapsed.
tasks.escalate_if: CSS-only tooltips cannot be implemented without additional JS.

acceptance_criteria: Star a menu item and verify it appears in the header.
Unstar a menu item and verify it is removed from the header.
Refresh page and verify favorites persist.

tasks.goal: Add favorites UI components to the sidebar and header.
deliverables: Updated templates/base.html with star toggle buttons and favorites container
Updated static/src/css/app.css with favorites UI styles
tasks.escalate_if: UI layout breaks significantly when adding star buttons.

tasks.goal: Implement client-side logic for favorites persistence and rendering.
deliverables: Updated templates/base.html with JavaScript logic for localStorage favorites
tasks.escalate_if: localStorage is unavailable or restricted in the target environment.
